Article: Damn you Evangelion
[]: Damn you Evangelion!             Quote Post by Janrok24 » Sun Feb 13, 2011 7:35 pm It was just another regular day at work when, out of boredom, I decided to check if the fanfic Nobody Dies had any updates after a long time of forgetting about eva stuff. Turns out it did so I read them all. I remembered how much I liked reading FFs to pass time and ended up adding like 9 new stories to my alerts. BUT I COULDN'T STOP THERE! I had to watch both Rebuild movies since I found them with decent quality and subtitles (no cams this time). And since clearly that wasn't enough I downloaded some 700 page after impact comic and read it all in one sitting. SOMEBODY MAKE IT STOOOOOOOP (whew I feel better now ;p)

[]: Re: Damn you Evangelion!             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Feb 13, 2011 7:36 pm Janrok24 wrote: SOMEBODY MAKE IT STOOOOOOOP

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sun Feb 13, 2011 7:40 pm Would that after-impact thing happen to be Epilogue of Evangelion?

[]: Re: Damn you Evangelion!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 13, 2011 8:22 pm Janrok24 wrote: (whew I feel better now ;p)

Turns out it did so I read them all. I remembered how much I liked reading FFs to pass time and ended up adding like 9 new stories to my alerts. BUT I COULDN'T STOP THERE! I had to watch both Rebuild movies since I found them with decent quality and subtitles (no cams this time). And since clearly that wasn't enough I downloaded some 700 page after impact comic and read it all in one sitting. SOMEBODY MAKE IT STOOOOOOOP (whew I feel better now ;p)
